response.original_title: Gran demostración gimnástica escolar en Lima
response.overview: A newsreel from the 1940s documenting a school gymnastics exhibition at the National Stadium, organized by the Directorate of Physical Education and School Hygiene of the Ministry of Public Education. Students from various public and private schools, as well as industrial schools, demonstrated a series of exercises using various equipment. Students from the Alfonso Ugarte School and the Leoncio Prado Military School were particularly noteworthy in this presentation.
response.title: Gran demostración gimnástica escolar en Lima
